name: Tom of Finland Foundation Artist-in-Residence Application 2026

payload.title: Tom of Finland Foundation Artist-in-Residence Application 2026

safeHTMLSchema: Tom of Finland Foundation stands at the crossroads of Queer history, erotic art, and cultural preservation. Through our Artist-in-Residence Program, we invite artists into a space where risk, play, and imagination are protected and encouraged. We know choosing this path can be hard—often lonely, often brave—and we’re sincerely glad you’ve come here to share your voice.
Tell us a bit more about yourself
Are you over 21 years of age?
Give us your biography as an artist
Have you previously participated in any residency programs?:
Describe your proposed project for the residency
How do you plan to specifically engage with/utilize the archives here at Tom of Finland Foundation?

The Foundation’s archives include original Tom of Finland artworks, personal papers, photographs, and holds one of the world’s most significant archives of Queer erotic art, including drawings, photographs, letters, and ephemera spanning decades of LGBTQ+ history. We encourage residents to consider how these collections may support research, spark creative projects, or inform new perspectives within queer art and culture.
How did you hear about the Tom of Finland Artist-in-Residence Program?
Do you have any special requirements or needs during your residency
Is there anything else you would like us to know about your application or proposed projects?:
Please submit work samples relevant to your practice/project proposal
Please attach the following as a PDF (Provide 3-8 work samples for review)
- Acceptable formats: JPEG, PDF, Video/audio as links only
- Video/sound works (2-3 examples) with 5 minutes maximum length each

List the title, year, medium, and dimensions for each uploaded work.
(Be sure to match the descriptive information to the exact filenames you uploaded.)

Example:
(Cover for "Sex on the Train"), 1985, graphite on paper, 13 × 9
Please upload your current resume or CV, including education, exhibitions, publications, and professional experiences here. -
If someone referred you, please list their name
Are you able to join our residency in LA, USA ?
Well done, and thank you for applying to Tom of Finland Foundation. We honor the Queer imagination and the care you brought to your submission, and we’ll be in touch shortly.
